summary: Comprehensive testing of Location Generator V2 module installation. All 23 backend API tests passed and all 12 frontend feature requirements verified. The module is fully functional: sidebar menu item with gold star icon, content panel with navigation buttons, DevPageGenerator list page, PageGeneratorEditor with full form, ByStateTab with all 50 state cards, and all /api/v2/ endpoints working correctly.

issues: 'Keywords' label appears twice: once from the Label component and again as a header inside KeywordTagsInput. Minor duplication but not a breaking issue.
Playwright 'get_by_text().first' syntax error when used with await — minor test script issue only, not a real UI bug. The live preview does work correctly showing /coverage-areas/... paths.

critical_code_review_comments: All 12 specified test requirements verified and passing — no critical issues found.
The /api/v2/ prefix is correctly applied via namespace='v2' in component_namespace.py
Public pages serve correctly under /coverage-areas/ prefix
Auth protection is properly applied: unauthenticated requests to /api/v2/page-generators and /api/v2/locations-meta return 401/403
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test generator 'UI_Test_Medical_Supplies' (id: 40664a06-753b-48c6-8f08-d30dd4a6e46e) during UI testing. Cleaned up successfully.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Location Generator V2 module fully installed and working. Namespace=v2, public_prefix=coverage-areas. Collections: v2_page_generators, v2_generated_pages, v2_site_settings. Admin API at /api/v2/. Public pages at /coverage-areas/. DevPageGenerator at /dev-settings/page-generator. PageGeneratorEditor at /dev-settings/page-generator/:id. All services present: locations_data, slug_engine, template_renderer, page_catalog, render_overlay, theme_inheritance, seo_jsonld, state_facts, content_variation. Frontend components: GeneratorCard, GeneratorsTable, DeleteGeneratorDialog, KeywordTagsInput, StatesPicker, PagesTab, PageSelector, StatCard, PreviewSampleDialog, ByStateTab.
verified_features: ✅ Dev Settings sidebar shows 'Location Generator V2' with gold star icon (⭐) after 'Location Generator'
✅ Clicking 'Location Generator V2' shows content panel with Star header, description, 'Open Full Editor' and 'View Coverage Areas' buttons
✅ DevPageGenerator shows 'Page Generators' header, 'MEDVera' company name, grid/list toggle, 'New Generator' button, empty state

✅ PageGeneratorEditor renders: Name field, Type/Product field, Keywords tag input, AI Content Generation toggle, Page Levels (State/County/City), Slug Pattern Editor with live /coverage-areas/ preview, Cancel/Save buttons
✅ GET /api/v2/page-generators returns {items:[], total:0} for empty list
✅ GET /api/v2/locations-meta returns 52 states/territories (>= 50 US states) with code, name, counties count, cities count
✅ POST /api/v2/page-generators creates generator and returns full doc with id
✅ GET /api/v2/page-generators/:id returns created generator with all fields pre-populated
✅ By State tab renders after generator created showing 4 StatCards (50 states, 2691 counties, 26087 cities, 0 pages) and state breakdown grid with Generate buttons
